items.title: Boeing will support SCAT Airlines in cargo operations launch

items.title: A year after deadly jet crash at Bangladesh school, families demand answers
items.dek: This week marks one year since a military jet struck a school in Dhaka, killing 36, most of them children.
items.body: This week marks one year since a military jet struck a school in Dhaka, killing 36, most of them children.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Blocked by censors, China's animal lovers take fight against abuse offline and overseas
items.dek: The killing of a dog and her puppies in Guangdong has sparked outrage inside and outside the country.
items.body: The killing of a dog and her puppies in Guangdong has sparked outrage inside and outside the country.
items.author: IriLine Desk
